name: Johann Kaspar Mertz
abstract: Joseph Kaspar Mertz (17 August 1806 – 14 October 1856) was an Austrian guitarist and composer.

works_created.t: 3 Nänien, Trauerlieder: 1. Am Grabe der Geliebten

about_quotes.speaker: Laurence Juber
about_quotes.evidence: Johann Caspar Mertz for example, was the Schumann of the guitar. I mean his music is incredibly impressionistic in the stuff that he was writing in the 1830s and 1840.
about_quotes.doc_title: Laurence Juber interviewed by Monk Rowe, Glasgow, Scotland, July 27, 2016 [interview 1 of 2]
